core_mechanism: alignment of discrete symbol sequences over a finite alphabet into columns of positional correspondence (homology), from which position-wise substitution, conservation, and covariation statistics are estimated to infer the constraints that generated the sequences
brief_reason: The abstract builds a (rhythm-aware) sequence-alignment method for one-dimensional finite-alphabet strings and then runs mutability, substitution-matrix, positional-conservation, and covariance analyses on the aligned variants to read off the forces shaping them, which is exactly alignment-based positional-statistics inference.
